name: Selestia - Size Stealing
description:
It would be a normal trip to the beach... if your friend didn't have something in mind first. She's gonna make sure you're always with her, whether that means turning you finger-sized or otherwise (The first one).

Artist - Benevolent Bunny

First bot, hope you guys like it. if it does pretty good, I might make another one, who knows.
